themes.name: Birthday Celebration
themes.description: A cheerful basket for birthdays with sweet treats. No alcohol. Each item must be from a different category.

themes.name: Holiday Season
themes.description: A festive basket for the holiday season. No two items from the same category.

themes.name: Romantic Evening
themes.description: A romantic basket with wine and chocolates. Each item must be from a different category.

themes.name: Sympathy & Comfort
themes.description: A comforting basket for difficult times. No alcohol. Items must be from different categories.

themes.name: Corporate Thank You
themes.description: A professional gift basket. Each item from a different category. Must include at least one premium item ($15+).
